node.text: Evan took his family on a road trip to Jasper last weekend, driving through the Icefields Parkway.

node.text: Evan described the road trip to Jasper as having fresh air, peacefulness, and a cozy cabin surrounded by mountains and forests.

node.text: Evan went on a vacation in Canada with their new significant other where they did activities like hiking and biking.
Evan acknowledges the importance of surrounding oneself with caring people.
Evan values being a supportive friend to Sam and is always there for him.
